name: writhing_stalker.live_high_threat_allied_light_retreat_stalk_mcw
description: Current-build staged/live high-threat row: local noon McWilliams fixture with save-transformed three-follower allied footing and one hostile writhing stalker on a naturally bright/focused tile. The bounded live window must choose overmatched stalking withdrawal with the live_high_threat_allied_light_retreat_stalk reason instead of close loiter.

steps.label: post_load_high_threat_allied_light_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: the harness-only noon/allied/stalker transformed McWilliams live-debug fixture loads to the normal live map before the live-plan window runs

steps.label: audit_saved_noon_before_high_threat_allied_light
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove local noon before the high-threat/allied writhing-stalker staged row
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player turn metadata proves the fixture is at local noon before the high-threat/allied writhing-stalker live row

steps.label: audit_saved_three_allied_followers_before_high_threat_light
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not contain three saved overmap NPC allies before the high-threat/allied writhing-stalker live row
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-overmap NPC metadata proves the transformed fixture contains three nearby follower NPC allies before the live-plan window

steps.label: audit_saved_writhing_stalker_before_high_threat_allied_scene
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not contain the transformed hostile mon_writhing_stalker before the high-threat/allied live row
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved active_monsters metadata proves the transformed fixture contains the hostile writhing stalker before the live-plan window

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_high_threat_allied_light_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off after the stalker spawn so the bounded live turn window is not consumed by the safe-mode monster warning prompt

steps.label: advance_high_threat_allied_light_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: a short live turn window runs after the allied high-threat stalker spawn; feature proof depends on same-run writhing_stalker live_plan debug lines, not the screenshot alone
steps.failure_rule: if the artifact delta lacks the high-threat allied withdrawal/stalking live_plan line, this scene is inconclusive rather than green

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_high_threat_allied_light_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain a live writhing-stalker high-threat/allied withdrawal line with allied_support=3 and stalk_omt=3
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the live monster-plan seam evaluated bright/focused contact with about three friendly allies and chose overmatched stalking withdrawal

recommended_test_command: make -j4 src/writhing_stalker_ai.o obj/monmove.o tests LINTJSON=0 ASTYLE=0 && ./tests/cata_test "[writhing_stalker]" --reporter compact

evidence_contract.claim: current-build staged/live bright high-threat row with about three friendly allies chooses overmatched stalking withdrawal instead of close loiter
evidence_contract.setup_guard: the run uses a harness-only local-noon save transform, save-transformed nearby follower NPC allies, and a save-transformed hostile writhing stalker; the live_plan line must independently report allied_support=3 and stalk_omt=3 as live behavior evidence.
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker high-threat behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No high-threat/allied live-scene credit if startup/load, saved noon guard, transformed allied/stalker footing, safe-mode-off live turn window, and same-run high-threat allied withdrawal/stalk line are not all present and classified separately. Save/writeback is not part of this live decision claim.
